C:\Users\Padra\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\MartinStorsjo.LLVM-MinGW.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\llvm-mingw-20260602-ucrt-x86_64\bin\clang++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\CppQuizzer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o CppQuizzer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libCppQuizzer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\CppQuizzer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
